*   **Questboard Category:**Shinbakufu> The Ox > Bessho Harumasa

*   **Quest Description**: The horn-helmed brute known as the Ox is Bessho Harumasa, a former retainer of the Bessho clan fanning the flames of rebellion from the safety of Miki Castle.

## Return to Nakamura Tadashige

You can track this quest using the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Shinbakufu and select the quest underneath The Ox (Bessho Harumasa).

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-04.jpg)

Head to Miki and speak with Nakamura Tadashige.

[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-05.jpg)[![Image 3](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-06.jpg)

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-07.jpg)

He asks if you are ready to fight the Ox:

*   [We are ready.]
*   [We need more time.]

[![Image 5](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-08.jpg)

In order to progress to quest, you must choose “We are ready.”

This is the first time the game presents you with four choices in a dialogue option:

*   [The Tsuno wishes to fight.]
*   [He will never get justice.]
*   [It's about more than the Tsuno.]
*   [Justice is not our goal.]

[![Image 6](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-09.jpg)

Just like most dialogue choices, this one does not affect the progress of the quest.

After that, choose which character you want to play as.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-12-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-12.jpg)

## Reach higher ground

Head forward and assassinate the two enemies in front of you.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-13-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-13.jpg)

Climb up the scaffolding to the next level.

## Kill the teppo-wielding guards

Start going along the wall to the left. Take out the first two guards in front of you.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-14-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-14.jpg)

Just to be safe, turn right and take care of the guard just across the path.

[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-16-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsbroken-horn-16.jpg)

Then, take out the guy to your left that stands in front of the western path.

We will show you the exact location on the map for every objective as well as recommendations for what choice to make if and when you are presented with such.

## The Onryo Samurai

This member of the Shinbakufu is found in the starter level, **The Onryo Samurai**. This target is impossible to miss due to it being the starter level of Assassin's Creed Shadows.

### The Onryo Samurai

The Onryo Samurai has taken the box Naoe retrieved in the kofun. **Retrieve the box** at Katano Castle. **Climb the tower**to get inside Katano Castle.

![Image 1: Climb the tower](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Climb-the-tower.jpg)
Follow the tutorial prompts that appear as you navigate the castle. You'll go through a couple of boxes until you find the samurai that stole yours.

Climb up the walls to **reach a high place to observe the Onryo Samurai**. When you're on the pole attached to the roof, jump down to **assassinate the Onryo Samurai** and **retrieve the box**.

![Image 2: Assassinate the Onryo Samurai](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Assassinate-the-Onryo-Samurai.jpg)
**Escape Katano Castle** and watch a cutscene. Welcome to Assassin's Creed Shadows!

## The Wounded

To start tracking The Wounded, you must first complete **The Fatherless Monk** quest. You can begin this quest after completing the quest **From Spark to Flame**.

### The Fatherless Monk

You can find the Fatherless Monk at Gansenji Temple. This is **south of Sakai** and **west of Izumi Coast**. Once you reach the temple, **kill all enemies** there then **talk to Kyonyo**.

![Image 3: Talk to Kyonyo Fatherless Monk v2](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Talk-to-Kyonyo-Fatherless-Monk-v2.jpg)
### Stolen Faith

**Find Mitsumune** in Izumi Settsu, he'll be north of Amagasaki. He'll send you to find a statue before he'll help with the fight against Wada Koretake.

![Image 4: Find Mitsumune](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Find-Mitsumune-1.jpg)

*   [The Two-Faced](http://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/assassins-creed-shadows-the-shinbakufu-walkthrough/#h-the-two-faced)
    *   [Topple the Traitor](http://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/assassins-creed-shadows-the-shinbakufu-walkthrough/#h-topple-the-traitor)

*   [The Horseman](http://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/assassins-creed-shadows-the-shinbakufu-walkthrough/#h-the-horseman)

To make this walkthrough easier for you to consume, we will focus only on the important parts, like locations you need to visit and NPCs you need to discover following in-game clues.

We will show you the exact location on the map for every objective as well as recommendations for what choice to make if and when you are presented with such.

## The Onryo Samurai

This member of the Shinbakufu is found in the starter level, **The Onryo Samurai**. This target is impossible to miss due to it being the starter level of Assassin's Creed Shadows.

### The Onryo Samurai

The Onryo Samurai has taken the box Naoe retrieved in the kofun. **Retrieve the box** at Katano Castle. **Climb the tower**to get inside Katano Castle.

![Image 1: Climb the tower](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Climb-the-tower.jpg)
Follow the tutorial prompts that appear as you navigate the castle. You'll go through a couple of boxes until you find the samurai that stole yours.

Climb up the walls to **reach a high place to observe the Onryo Samurai**. When you're on the pole attached to the roof, jump down to **assassinate the Onryo Samurai** and **retrieve the box**.

![Image 2: Assassinate the Onryo Samurai](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Assassinate-the-Onryo-Samurai.jpg)
**Escape Katano Castle** and watch a cutscene. Welcome to Assassin's Creed Shadows!

## The Wounded

To start tracking The Wounded, you must first complete **The Fatherless Monk** quest. You can begin this quest after completing the quest **From Spark to Flame**.

### The Fatherless Monk

You can find the Fatherless Monk at Gansenji Temple. This is **south of Sakai** and **west of Izumi Coast**. Once you reach the temple, **kill all enemies** there then **talk to Kyonyo**.

![Image 3: Talk to Kyonyo Fatherless Monk v2](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Talk-to-Kyonyo-Fatherless-Monk-v2.jpg)
### Stolen Faith

**Find Mitsumune** in Izumi Settsu, he'll be north of Amagasaki. He'll send you to find a statue before he'll help with the fight against Wada Koretake.

![Image 4: Find Mitsumune](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Find-Mitsumune-1.jpg)
The statue was taken to **Senri Hills**, **it is at a Toneyama Post Town**, and **is guarded by bandits**. You'll find the statue in a room guarded by a bandit wielding a kanabo.

![Image 5: Find the Statue](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/upload

sections.section:
### Broken Horn

Once you have completed Brother in Arms and Of My Enemy, **return to Nakamura Tadashige**in Miki.

![Image 67: Broken Horn Return to Nakamura Tadashige](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Broken-Horn-Return-to-Nakamura-Tadashige.jpg)
Naoe will sneak into Miki Castle and take out the Ox's gunmen and reach the deserters. Meanwhile Yasuke will take on the Ox himself.

#### Yasuke Path

**Kill the Ox's men, continue the assault,**then **talk to the dying soldier**. A cutscene will start and you'll need to **defeat the Tsuno**.

Your final objective is to **assassinate the Ox**, Bessho Harusama.

![Image 68: The Ox Fight](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Ox-Fight.jpg)
#### Naoe Route

**Kill the 5 teppo-wielding guards**. When the gunmen are dead, **look for Yasuke** and a cutscene will occur and Yasuke will fight the Tsuno.

As Yasuke fights below, **secure the area** where the deserters are. The area you start out in is small, crowded, and you can easily be seen by the guards. This is a good time to use some smoke bombs for instant cover.

When the guards are dead, **talk to the deserter** then **reach Yasuke's location**. Your last objective is to **assassinate the Ox**. Start by taking out all the soldiers one by one until only the Ox is left.

With all the soldiers dead, sneak up behind the Ox for an assassination attack. This won't kill him instant, so go up the house's roof and let him lose sight of you.

As he's searching for you, jump down to assassinate attack him again and repeat this until he's defeated. It's cheesy but he hits like a truck, it's safer this way.

![Image 69](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Jump-down-on-the-Ox.jpg)
Once Bessho Harusama is defeated, you'll receive the following rewards:

*   Legendary Kanabo – [Daybreak's Fury](https://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/all-legendary-weapons-in-assassins-creed-shadows/#h-daybreak-s-fury)
*   Engraving – Shrapnel from Breaking Armor
*   290 mon

Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Fighting for the Cause Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-fighting-for-the-cause-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T17:16:19+00:00

Markdown Content:
Fighting for the Cause is the 71st main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Fighting for the Cause main mission.

*   **Region:**Wakasa
*   **Questboard Category:**Templar >Kimura Kei
*   **Quest Giver:**Available automatically after completing the quest [The Path He Walks](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-path-he-walks-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Available immediately after completing the quest [The Path He Walks](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-path-he-walks-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**35
*   **Reward:**3300 EXP, 2 Mastery points
*   **Quest Description**: Yasuke goes to Kii to find a Japanese sword master under the employ of Nuno Caro.

## Talk to the ronin

To track Fighting for the Cause, navigate to the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Templar group and select the quest under Kimura Kei.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-11-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-11.jpg)

Takahara Village is near the bottom of the map in the Kii region. It resides in the middle of the Nakahechi Route sub-region.

[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-05.jpg)[![Image 3](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-04.jpg)

If you haven't done any exploration, the easiest way to find Takahara Village is to Start at Katsuragi and take the long trek south.

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-09.jpg)

While in Koyasan, the town marked with a triangle on the map above, is where you need to go after you speak to the ronin. Make your life easier by activating either the viewpoint or the kakurega fast travel locations.

Find the Takahara Village inn. Go in and speak to the ronin. If you are not Yasuke, switch to him now.

[![Image 5](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-06.jpg)[![Image 6](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-07.jpg)

The ronin presents a dialogue choice:

*   [I make my own purpose.]
*   [Life must go on.]

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-08.jpg)

This choice doesn't affect anything.

## Find Kumabe Ujiie

Fast travel back to Koyasen. Then, head east out of town until you find a fork in the road. Take the left fork north to find the Okunoin Cemetary.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-10-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-10.jpg)

Look for a specific statue much further back in the cemetery.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-14-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-14.jpg)[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-12-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-fight-for-the-cause-12.jpg)

sections.section:
Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Flames of War Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T16:02:15+00:00

Markdown Content:
Flames of War is the 3rd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Flames of War main mission.

## Destroy the reinforced door

Once inside the castle walls, head north to the first barricaded door.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-07.jpg)[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-08.jpg)

Press![Image 3: :l3:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l3.png) to sprint and charge into the barricaded door to break it down.

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-09.jpg)

## Kill the resistance

A group of shinobi attacks you after you break down the door. Dispatch them. Seven shinobi come at you this time, so be sure to hold![Image 5: :l1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l1.png) / ![Image 6: :lb:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/lb.png) to block attacks, if needed.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-01-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-01.jpg)

## Reach the top of the castle

During this fight, you are directed to move on. From the door you broke down, head east through an open gate. If your health is low, press![Image 8: :up:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/up.png) to eat a ration and replenish your health.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-03.jpg)

Continue east until you reach a stairway going south. At the top of those stairs, several of your allies blow up the door blocking the path. Follow them after they blow down the door.

[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-04.jpg)[![Image 11](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-05.jpg)

## Kill the Igan leader

Once past this doorway, an elite shinobi appears. This shinobi proves more formidable simply because you must first break through his armor.

[![Image 12](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-06.jpg)

His armor bar is indicated as a yellow bar above his health. A staged sequence occurs here where the game prompts you to parry several times in a row as this elite shinobi attacks you. After that, cut him down. Since your allies also attack him, he does not prove much resistance.

## Reach Mibuno Castle's inner yard

Head up a ramp to the west. Sprint into the closed door to smash through it. This triggers a scene with Oda Nobunaga.

After the cutscene you get a short animus transition screen, then the next quest “[Fight of the Kakushiba Ikki](https://www.powerpyx.com/?p=271180&preview=true)” begins with you changing perspective to Fujibayashi Naoe.

This finishes Flames of War in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

Flames of War is the 3rd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Flames of War main mission.

## Destroy the reinforced door

Once inside the castle walls, head north to the first barricaded door.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-07.jpg)[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-08.jpg)

Press![Image 3: :l3:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l3.png) to sprint and charge into the barricaded door to break it down.

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-09.jpg)

## Kill the resistance

A group of shinobi attacks you after you break down the door. Dispatch them. Seven shinobi come at you this time, so be sure to hold![Image 5: :l1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l1.png) / ![Image 6: :lb:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/lb.png) to block attacks, if needed.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-01-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-01.jpg)

## Reach the top of the castle

During this fight, you are directed to move on. From the door you broke down, head east through an open gate. If your health is low, press![Image 8: :up:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/up.png) to eat a ration and replenish your health.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-03.jpg)

Continue east until you reach a stairway going south. At the top of those stairs, several of your allies blow up the door blocking the path. Follow them after they blow down the door.

[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-04.jpg)[![Image 11](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-05.jpg)

## Kill the Igan leader

Once past this doorway, an elite shinobi appears. This shinobi proves more formidable simply because you must first break through his armor.

[![Image 12](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-flames-of-war-06.jpg)

His armor bar is indicated as a yellow bar above his health. A staged sequence occurs here where the game prompts you to parry several times in a row as this elite shinobi attacks you. After that, cut him down. Since your allies also attack him, he does not prove much resistance.

## Reach Mibuno Castle's inner yard

Head up a ramp to the west. Sprint into the closed door to smash through it. This triggers a scene with Oda Nobunaga.

After the cutscene you get a short animus transition screen, then the next quest “[Fight of the Kakushiba Ikki](https://www.powerpyx.com/?p=271180&preview=true)” begins with you changing perspective to Fujibayashi Naoe.

This finishes Flames of War in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

Lightning and Thunder is the 22nd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Lightning and Thunder main mission.

*   **Region:**Yamashiro
*   **Questboard Category:**The Onryo >Oda Nobunaga
*   **Quest Giver:**Automatically starts after completing[Temple of the Swordsman](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-temple-of-the-horseman-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Complete the quest [Temple of the Swordsman](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-temple-of-the-horseman-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**12

*   **Quest Description:**Find Naoe.

## Enter the tenshu

As you gain control of Yasuke, you face off against several shinobi. You are now a powerhouse, so you don't need to worry about breaking enemy posture as much. Just hack away, and these enemies fall quickly.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-03.jpg)

Another group of four enemies awaits you further down the path. Take them out as well with similar abandon.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-05.jpg)

Head west to face the next group. Among this group is one elite enemy. Apart from maybe a little more dodging, you can take these guys out as easily as the last couple fights.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-06.jpg)

Head south up the stairs and fight the next group outside of the tower.

[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-08.jpg)

Sprint into the tower door to break down the door to meet with Naoe.

[![Image 11](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-10-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-lightning-and-thunder-10.jpg)

This finishes Lightning and Thunder in Assassin's Creed Shadows. This quest now automatically moves into [Mibuno Showdown](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-mibuno-showdown-walkthrough/).

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Nobutsuna Sensei Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-nobutsuna-sensei-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T16:26:38+00:00

Markdown Content:
Nobutsuna Sensei is the 25th main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Nobutsuna Sensei main mission.

*   **Region:**Omi
*   **Questboard Category:**Yasuke >Yasuke
*   **Quest Giver:**Automatically starts immediately after completing the quest [An Education](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-an-education-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Begins immediately after completing the quest [An Education](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-an-education-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**18
*   **Reward:**1000 EXP
*   **Quest Description:**A flashback of Yasuke's past.

## Follow the retainer

When you regain control, follow the retainer south. You can auto-follow if you wish, but he only takes you to the training grounds in the next area south of you.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-02-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-02.jpg)

Upon arrival, a cutscene plays, complete with a dialogue choice:

*   [I have fought my share of battles.]
*   [I have much to learn.]

[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-03.jpg)

The options do not change anything. Choose whichever you like.

## Duel with Nagayoshi

When you regain control, you find yourself in a sparring match with Marume Nagayoshi.

[![Image 3](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-04.jpg)

He essentially only uses heavy attacks. So, dodging is the best way to deal with him. An easy strategy is to do two or three light attacks and then dodge. By the time you use your third attack, Nagayoshi starts charging his heavy attack.

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-05.jpg)

Keep following this pattern until you defeat him.

## Reach your room

When you regain control, go down the stairs in front of you and approach your room.

[![Image 5](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-06.jpg)

After a brief cutscene, you face off against some rival students. The strategy remains the same.

[![Image 6](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-09.jpg)

Otherwise, you can let the rival student win and end the fight that much sooner. Whether you win or lose this fight is irrelevant. It just changes some of the dialogue in the following cutscene.

In that cutscene, you face a dialogue choice with Lady Oichi:

*   [I am content being alone.]
*   [Some company might be nice.]
*   [I try not to think about it.]

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-10-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-10.jpg)

The choice [Some company might be nice.] garners you a little favor with Lady Oichi for later. Apart from that, these options don't affect much else in the meantime.

## Chase the suspicious man

After a cutscene, chase after the suspicious man.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-11-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-nobotsuna-sensei-11.jpg)

Chase him up the stairs in front of you, then turn right up another set of stairs.

[![Image

Showdown in Sakamoto is the 30th main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Showdown in Sakamoto main mission.

*   **Region:**Omi
*   **Questboard Category:**Shinbakufu>The Naginata >Showdown in Sakamoto

*   **Requirement:**Available immediately after completing the quest [Against the Koga-ryu](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-against-the-koga-ryu-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**20
*   **Reward:**2000 EXP, 1 Mastery Level
*   **Quest Description**:The Naginata controls Shinbakufu activity in southern Omi. He has been revealed to be Akechi Mitsuhide's nephew, Akechi Kagemitsu.

## Meet Shotei

You can track this quest from the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Shikinubuku group and select the quest underneath Akechi Kagemitsu.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-03.jpg)

Find Sakamoto Tower on a hill to the northwest of Sakamoto. Speak to Shotei when you get there.

[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-05.jpg)[![Image 3](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-06.jpg)

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-07.jpg)

Shotei presents you with a dialogue choice to continue the quest:

*   [I am ready.]
*   [Not yet.]

[![Image 5](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-08-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-08.jpg)

You must choose “I am ready” to continue the quest.

## Kill Gamo Yoshimitsu

Regardless of who you were playing before this, you automatically regain control as Yasuke in front of the Sakamoto Castle.

[![Image 6](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-09-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-09.jpg)

No one is immediately hostile to you here, so head in and make your way south.

When you reach this spot, enemies become hostile.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-10-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-10.jpg)

You can try to sneak in, but you will end up in a fight no matter what you do. So, you might as well take out the enemies as you come across them. That way, they don't build up large numbers against you at any one time.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-11-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-11.jpg)

You find Gamo Yoshimitsu in the southernmost house on the Yoshimitsu Estate.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-12-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-showdown-in-sakamoto-12.jpg)

### Showdown in Sakamoto

**Meet Shotei** in the tower that overlooks Sakamoto. When you are ready to proceed, Shotei and Katsuhime will share their plan with you.

![Image 38: Meet Shotei at Sakamoto Tower](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Meet-Shotei-at-Sakamoto-Tower.jpg)
When the showdown starts, you'll start as Yasuke and need to **kill Gamo Yoshimitsu** at the Yoshimitsu Estate. He'll fight in a duel, one samurai against another.

![Image 39: Kill Gamo Yoshimitsu](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Kill-Gamo-Yoshimitsu.jpg)
With Gamo Yoshimitsu dead, you'll play as Naoe. **Destroy three explosives** at Sakamoto Castle's armory. The explosives will appear as red pots with a target painted on them.

![Image 40: Destroy the Explosives Example](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Destroy-the-Explosives-Example.jpg)![Image 41: Destroy the Explosives](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Destroy-the-Explosives.jpg)
With the explosives destroyed, **regroup with Katsuhime** on the roof of the armory. **Meet Shotei**to begin the final assault on the castle and **assassinate Akechi Kagemitsu**.

Akechi Kagemitsu will be on the second floor the castle and loses all his bravado without any backup.

![Image 42: Assassinate Akechi Kagemitsu](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Assassinate-Akechi-Kagemitsu-1980x828.jpg)
You'll receive the following rewards:

*   Legendary Naginata – [Sage's Reach](https://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/all-legendary-weapons-in-assassins-creed-shadows/#h-sage-s-reach)
*   Engraving – Stack Damage After Block
*   295 mon

# Assassin's Creed Shadows Spirit of A Warrior Walkthrough

March 18, 2025 by [LunarMothea](https://www.powerpyx.com/author/timmberelli/)[Leave a Comment](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-a-warrior-walkthrough/#respond)

Spirit of A Warrior is the 2nd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Spirit of A Warrior main mission.

[![Image 11](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warriort-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warriort-03.jpg)

## Kill the Igan shinobi

From where you take over, run straight ahead (easterly) across a short wooden bridge and defeat the enemies who are marked by blue squares. Use ![Image 12: :r1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/r1.png)![Image 13: :r2:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/r2.png) /:rb: ![Image 14: :rt:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/rt.png)for quick strikes and power strikes, respectively.

Once you defeat these enemies, cross easterly a longer bridge and defeat the three enemies you meet there.

[![Image 15](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-05.jpg)

After that fight, follow the path to the north to encounter the shinobi. Defeat him, but stay mindful of his posture. Hold R1 and R2 to break his posture when he blocks.

## Kill the shinobi leaders

Head east across a rice patty to fight another shinobi. Use![Image 16: :l1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l1.png) / ![Image 17: :lb:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/lb.png) to parry attacks when a circle appears around your enemy's hands.

[![Image 18](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-06.jpg)

## Join Oda Nobunaga

Continue easterly and follow the path to reach your horse. A cutscene plays here.

[![Image 19](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-07-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-spirit-of-the-warrior-07.jpg)

## Reach the castle entrance

Follow the path north to reach Mibuno Castle, fending off shinobi as you go. Soon you find yourself inside the castle gate.

This finishes Spirit of A Warrior in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

sections.section:
Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows The Lord's Favor Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-lords-favor-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T16:00:28+00:00

Markdown Content:
The Lord's Favor is the 1st main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the The Lord's Favor main mission.

When first starting the game you will be booted into the new Animus Hub. From the Memories section select Assassin's Creed Shadows to start a new game.

## New Game Settings:

If you're going for trophies/achievements it's recommended to start the game with Guided Exploration = Off (default setting).One trophy![Image 1: trophy](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/trophy.png)**Scouting Mission**_(gather information using a scout)_ is not obtainable with Guided Exploration mode turned on, because the gameplay functionality to use scouts is unavailable in guided mode. When Guided Mode turned off you'll automatically unlock the trophy during a tutorial after the Prologue that introduces you to Scouts.

The game gives a somewhat misleading warning and says that playing in Guided Mode disables _*some*_ trophies, but in reality it only affects this one trophy. Everything else is still obtainable in guided mode. The best approach is to play up to the point where you earn the Scouting Mission trophy. After that you can turn on Guided Mode in the gameplay options at any time, as it doesn't affect any other trophies/achievements. During the Prologue there are still waypoints for everything so there won't be any difference between the modes initially. Of course you can also stick with Guided Mode = Off for the whole game, with the walkthrough here you'll find everything easily.

For difficulty it doesn't matter what you pick, all trophies/achievements are obtainable on “Story difficulty” (easiest setting). If you play in Canon Mode also doesn't matter, but for the best experience and for this walkthrough we recommend Canon Mode = Off. If you turn it on it will remove all dialogue choices. Immersive Mode makes characters speak in their local language (mostly Japanese and some Portugese), you can keep this turned off if you prefer everyone to speak in your selected game language.

*   Difficulty = Any (Story will suffice for trophies/achievements)
*   Guided Exploration = Off (*can turn it On after earning![Image 2: trophy](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/trophy.png)**Scouting Mission**)
*   Canon Mode = Off
*   Immersive Mode = Off

## Follow Akechi Mitsushide

After the opening cutscene, you will play as Yasuke. This is a very short and self-explanatory opening quest. Simply follow the group of men in front of you until you reach the temple where a cutscene starts.

Here you are introduced to Oda Nobunaga. Yasuke and Father Valignano have a meeting with Nobunaga to request free movement for the European priests. If you play with Canon Mode turned off (recommended), you get to make your first dialogue choice here. What you say doesn't really matter (as is the case with most choices), it only affects the next line of dialogue.

*   I understand you well = Everyone is shocked to hear the black samurai speak their language. Nobunaga accuses Father Valignano of deceiving him, because he said the black Samurai doesn't understand their tongue. Nobunaga sends Valignano away and speaks to Yasuke alone. This also skips the second set of dialogues.
*   [Say Nothing] = Nobunaga sends Valignano away and speaks to Yasuke alone. This gives a second set of choices “I was following Valignano's orders” / “I am still learning your language and customs”. What you say doesn't matter, either way Nobunaga is intringued by you.

Either way, Nobunaga sends Valignano away and wants to speak to Yasuke alone. Then Valignano returns and Nobunaga grants his request.

After the cutscene you get a short animus transition screen, then the next quest “Spirit of a Warrior” begins immediately with a large battle.

This finishes The Lord's Favor in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-que

Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows The Lord's Favor Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-lords-favor-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T16:00:28+00:00

Markdown Content:
The Lord's Favor is the 1st main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the The Lord's Favor main mission.

When first starting the game you will be booted into the new Animus Hub. From the Memories section select Assassin's Creed Shadows to start a new game.

## New Game Settings:

If you're going for trophies/achievements it's recommended to start the game with Guided Exploration = Off (default setting).One trophy![Image 1: trophy](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/trophy.png)**Scouting Mission**_(gather information using a scout)_ is not obtainable with Guided Exploration mode turned on, because the gameplay functionality to use scouts is unavailable in guided mode. When Guided Mode turned off you'll automatically unlock the trophy during a tutorial after the Prologue that introduces you to Scouts.

The game gives a somewhat misleading warning and says that playing in Guided Mode disables _*some*_ trophies, but in reality it only affects this one trophy. Everything else is still obtainable in guided mode. The best approach is to play up to the point where you earn the Scouting Mission trophy. After that you can turn on Guided Mode in the gameplay options at any time, as it doesn't affect any other trophies/achievements. During the Prologue there are still waypoints for everything so there won't be any difference between the modes initially. Of course you can also stick with Guided Mode = Off for the whole game, with the walkthrough here you'll find everything easily.

For difficulty it doesn't matter what you pick, all trophies/achievements are obtainable on “Story difficulty” (easiest setting). If you play in Canon Mode also doesn't matter, but for the best experience and for this walkthrough we recommend Canon Mode = Off. If you turn it on it will remove all dialogue choices. Immersive Mode makes characters speak in their local language (mostly Japanese and some Portugese), you can keep this turned off if you prefer everyone to speak in your selected game language.

*   Difficulty = Any (Story will suffice for trophies/achievements)
*   Guided Exploration = Off (*can turn it On after earning![Image 2: trophy](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/trophy.png)**Scouting Mission**)
*   Canon Mode = Off
*   Immersive Mode = Off

## Follow Akechi Mitsushide

After the opening cutscene, you will play as Yasuke. This is a very short and self-explanatory opening quest. Simply follow the group of men in front of you until you reach the temple where a cutscene starts.

Here you are introduced to Oda Nobunaga. Yasuke and Father Valignano have a meeting with Nobunaga to request free movement for the European priests. If you play with Canon Mode turned off (recommended), you get to make your first dialogue choice here. What you say doesn't really matter (as is the case with most choices), it only affects the next line of dialogue.

*   I understand you well = Everyone is shocked to hear the black samurai speak their language. Nobunaga accuses Father Valignano of deceiving him, because he said the black Samurai doesn't understand their tongue. Nobunaga sends Valignano away and speaks to Yasuke alone. This also skips the second set of dialogues.
*   [Say Nothing] = Nobunaga sends Valignano away and speaks to Yasuke alone. This gives a second set of choices “I was following Valignano's orders” / “I am still learning your language and customs”. What you say doesn't matter, either way Nobunaga is intringued by you.

Either way, Nobunaga sends Valignano away and wants to speak to Yasuke alone. Then Valignano returns and Nobunaga grants his request.

After the cutscene you get a short animus transition screen, then the next quest “Spirit of a Warrior” begins immediately with a large battle.

This finishes The Lord's Favor in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

# Assassin's Creed Shadows The Rising Tide Walkthrough

March 18, 2025 by [LunarMothea](https://www.powerpyx.com/author/timmberelli/)[Leave a Comment](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-walkthrough/#respond)

The Rising Tide is the 33rd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the The Rising Tide main mission.

*   **Region:**Yamashiro
*   **Questboard Category:**Shinbakufu>The Onryo >The Shinbakufu
*   **Quest Giver:**Available automatically after completing the quest [Missing Missive](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-missing-missive-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Available immediately after completing the quest [Missing Missive](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-missing-missive-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**13
*   **Reward:**1000 EXP
*   **Quest Description**: An intercepted letter mentions Ise Sadaoki's attendance at an upcoming sumo match, giving naoe and Yasuke the unexpected opportunity to corner him.

## Wait for Ise Sadaoki to arrive

To track this quest, use the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Onryo group and select the quest underneath the Shinbakufu.

Go to Oyamazaki Village and swim across the Ogura River to reach the waiting point.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-03.jpg)[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-04.jpg)

Press![Image 11: :triangle:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/triangle.png)/ ![Image 12: :y:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/y.png) at that point to wait.

[![Image 13](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-01-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-01.jpg)[![Image 14](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-06.jpg)

This leads to a dialogue option:

*   [The real threat is the mind.] – Yasuke
*   [The real threat is strength.] – Naoe

[![Image 15](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-02-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-02.jpg)

Choose whichever option you want. The choice doesn't affect the outcome.

This finishes The Rising Tide in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

The Rising Tide is the 33rd main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the The Rising Tide main mission.

*   **Region:**Yamashiro
*   **Questboard Category:**Shinbakufu>The Onryo >The Shinbakufu
*   **Quest Giver:**Available automatically after completing the quest [Missing Missive](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-missing-missive-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Available immediately after completing the quest [Missing Missive](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-missing-missive-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**13
*   **Reward:**1000 EXP
*   **Quest Description**: An intercepted letter mentions Ise Sadaoki's attendance at an upcoming sumo match, giving naoe and Yasuke the unexpected opportunity to corner him.

## Wait for Ise Sadaoki to arrive

To track this quest, use the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Onryo group and select the quest underneath the Shinbakufu.

Go to Oyamazaki Village and swim across the Ogura River to reach the waiting point.

[![Image 9](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-03-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-03.jpg)[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-04.jpg)

Press![Image 11: :triangle:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/triangle.png)/ ![Image 12: :y:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/y.png) at that point to wait.

[![Image 13](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-01-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-01.jpg)[![Image 14](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-06.jpg)

This leads to a dialogue option:

*   [The real threat is the mind.] – Yasuke
*   [The real threat is strength.] – Naoe

[![Image 15](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-02-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-the-rising-tide-02.jpg)

Choose whichever option you want. The choice doesn't affect the outcome.

This finishes The Rising Tide in Assassin's Creed Shadows.

For all other Quests refer to[**Assassin's Creed Shadows Walkthrough**](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-walkthrough-all-main-quests/).

### The Rising Tide

**Wait for Ise Sadaoki to arrive** at the [Iwashimizi Hachiman Shrine](https://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/all-shrine-locations-in-assassins-creed-shadows/#h-iwashimizu-hachiman-shrine). A cutscene will start and you'll get to see some sumo wrestle. After the cutscene, the quest will be complete.

![Image 20: Wait for Ise Sadaoki](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Wait-for-Ise-Sadaoki.jpg)

Title: Assassin's Creed Shadows The Wheel Unmasked Walkthrough

URL Source: http://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-wheel-unmasked-walkthrough/

Published Time: 2025-03-18T16:44:57+00:00

Markdown Content:
The Wheel Unmasked is the 40th main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the The Wheel Unmasked main mission.

*   **Region:**Omi
*   **Questboard Category:**Shinbakufu>The Onryo > The Mourner
*   **Quest Giver:**Available automatically after completing the quests [Nagahama Black Powder](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-nagahama-black-powder-walkthrough/), [A Prayer for Omi](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-a-prayer-for-omi-walkthrough/), and [The Price of Rice](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-price-of-rice-walkthrough/)
*   **Requirement:**Available immediately after completing the quests [Nagahama Black Powder](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-nagahama-black-powder-walkthrough/),[A Prayer for Omi](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-a-prayer-for-omi-walkthrough/), and[The Price of Rice](https://www.powerpyx.com/assassins-creed-shadows-the-price-of-rice-walkthrough/)
*   **Recommended Level:**22
*   **Reward:**2000 EXP, 3 Mastery Points
*   **Quest Description**: The Mourner's mask streams silent tears. But for who?.

## Meet Kuma

You can track this quest using the Objectives Board. Scroll to the Shinbakufu and select the quest underneath The Mourner.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-05-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-05.jpg)[![Image 2](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-06-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-06.jpg)

Use the viewpoint fast travel in Nagahama. Then follow the road north along the coast until you reach Shiotsu.

[![Image 3](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-04-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-04.jpg)

Just before reaching Shiotsu, you approach Shiotsu Shrine right off the road. Approach the shrine to find one of your kunai stuck in the rock fence.

[![Image 4](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-10-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-10.jpg)

Yasuke joins you, giving you the option to choose which character to play. Choose whichever playstyle you prefer.

[![Image 5](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-12-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-12.jpg)

## Track down the Wheel's location

When you regain control, go straight forward (westerly) to the edge of town. There, you find Riverside Hatago.

[![Image 6](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-13-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-13.jpg)

Climb up the eastern wall of the Riverside Hatago. Then, use Eagle Eye (R3/Right Stick) to find the closest blue spot that appears.

[![Image 7](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-14-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-14.jpg)

When close, hold![Image 8: :l2:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l2.png) / ![Image 9: :lt:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/lt.png) to listen to them talk about the samurai.

## Kill the Shinbakufu samurai

If you wish, feel free to go straight west to the other side of Riverside Hatago to find the samurai.

The easiest way is to go around the Riverside Hatago to the west side and go in through the door right next to the samurai.

[![Image 10](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadowsthe-wheel-unmasked-15-300

### The Wheel Unmasked

After completing the previous quests, you'll need to **regroup at the rendezvous point**. **It is in Omi, in eastern Shiotsu,**and **it is inside the town's shrine**.

![Image 31: Regroup at the rendezvous point](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Regroup-at-the-rendezvous-point.jpg)
After you choose to play as Yasuke or Naoe, **find clues to the Wheel's identity**. Listen in on conversations around the harbor and check the Harbor Offices.

![Image 32: Find clues to the Wheel's Identity](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Find-clues-to-the-Wheels-Identity.jpg)
Once you have the clues, **return to the rendezvous point**. Choose to play as Yasuke or Naoe and **assassinate the Wheel** at Hogonji Temple.

Listen to The Mourner's situation and choose to spare her or assassinate her.

![Image 33: The Mourner with Mask](https://vulkk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/The-Mourner-with-Mask-1980x828.jpg)
You'll receive the following rewards:

*   Legendary Long Katana – [Myth Slayer](https://vulkk.com/2025/03/20/all-legendary-weapons-in-assassins-creed-shadows/#h-myth-slayer)
*   300 mon

Markdown Content:
Wake Up Call is the 7th main quest in Assassin's Creed Shadows.This walkthrough will guide you through all objectives of the Wake Up Call main mission.

## Pick up the bokken

Approach Nagato, but be wary that he attacks very quickly.

[![Image 1](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-12-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-12.jpg)

The prompts appear, but you only get half a second to dodge. You can more easily do this if you go straight for the bokken and press ![Image 2: :circle:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/o.png) / ![Image 3: :b:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/b.png)to dodge right into it. Press ![Image 4: :triangle:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/triangle.png) / ![Image 5: :y:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/y.png)to pick up the bokken when you're close enough.

## Guard Break Nagato

Get in range of Nagato, and then hold![Image 6: :r1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/r1.png) / ![Image 7: :rb:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/rb.png) until your weapon flashes and let go of the button to guard break. Do this four times.

[![Image 8](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-14-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-14.jpg)

## Deflect Nagato's Attacks

The parry prompt appears for longer than it did in the first step of this quest. When it does, press![Image 9: :l1:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/l1.png) / ![Image 10: :b:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/b.png)to parry. Do this four times.

[![Image 11](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-17-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-17.jpg)

## Duel with Nagato

Use what you have learned to beat Nagato in a duel. You do not take any damage during this duel, so you cannot lose. Deal with a few exchanges, and a cutscene plays.

[![Image 12](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-18-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-18.jpg)

## Follow Nagato

Head west with Nagato along the path. To make things easy, hold ![Image 13: :x:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/x.png) / ![Image 14: :a:](http://www.powerpyx.com/wp-includes/images/smilies/a.png) when near Nagato to automatically follow him.

[![Image 15](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-23-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-23.jpg)

## Talk to Matsu

When Nagato leaves, head southwest across the wood bridge and follow the path.

[![Image 16](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-24-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-24.jpg)

Eventually, the path curves up a hill to a house. Press Triangle next to Matsu to talk to her.

[![Image 17](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-25-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-25.jpg)[![Image 18](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-26-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-26.jpg)

## Find Matsu's troublemaker

When you regain control, go forward up the path from Matsu's house.When you reach a fractured tree, climb up said tree and cross the gap.

[![Image 19](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-27-300x169.jpg)](https://www.powerpyx.com/wp-content/uploads/assassins-creed-shadows-wake-up-call-27.jpg)[![Image 20]
